## Problem sets

- [In-class Exercise 1](https://yyliou.github.io/pa/pa-ps/ex1.html)

## Submission Requirements

> ⚠️ **All assignments must be submitted using the official template provided below.**
>
> Submissions that are missing any of the following elements will receive a grade of zero. This policy is non-negotiable.

### Template

Copy the following template as the starting point for every submission. Replace all placeholder values before submitting.

````{r,eval=F}
---
title: "Ex. X"
author: "Student ID"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
print(uuid::UUIDgenerate())
```

## Question 1

*(Write your response here.)*

## Question 2

*(Write your response here.)*
````

### Checklist

Before submitting, verify that your document satisfies all of the following criteria:

-   [ ] The `title` field in the YAML header is completed.
-   [ ] The `author` field includes your student ID *only*.
-   [ ] The final document must be submitted strictly in `.pdf` format.
-   [ ] The document's name should be `ex?-id.pdf`, eg (`ex1-D10627008.pdf`).

## Submit Your Assignments

Upload your PDF [here](https://u.pcloud.link/publink/show?code=kZaVeI5ZjmzQXBbRlv7XxLzlO1xTDB92w9Kk) and place it in the corresponding folder (e.g., `ex1` for Exercise 1).

## Check your grade

- [Here](https://u.pcloud.link/publink/show?code=kZgSqI5ZXpSmLylHANukDaMOW6lwHzVhiAA7)
